title: Ochrocephala imatongensis
taxonomy: Ochrocephala imatongensis is classified within the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. The genus Ochrocephala is part of the tribe Lamieae, a diverse group of flowering plants. Ochrocephala imatongensis is a species of flowering plant endemic to the region of Borneo. Its classification is further specified at the order level as Lamiales. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Lamiaceae family.
